items.title: India Hits the Russia Reset Button as Oil Flows Hit Near-Record Levels
items.summary: The temporary easing of U.S. sanctions on Russian crude has rapidly redrawn global oil flows, with India stepping back in as the dominant buyer of previously distressed barrels. Even as overall imports are about to ease seasonally, Russian volumes in

items.title: Traders Ramp Up Bearish Oil Bets To Nearly $1 Billion
items.summary: Traders have poured a record $977 million into the ProShares UltraShort Bloomberg Crude Oil ETF (SCO), a leveraged bet that oil prices will collapse from their war-driven highs. Despite the high-volume, double-leveraged bet, the ETF still dropped 41%

items.title: Oil Falls 2% as Trump Says U.S. Will Exit Iran 'Pretty Quickly'

items.title: Prices Sag as US Oil Inventories Climb

items.title: China Resells Record LNG Volumes as Global Gas Crunch Bites
